checks.description: IAM users should have recent activity or be disabled
checks.query: select name, password_last_used, create_date, password_enabled from aws_iam_user
checks.deny_condition: password_enabled == true AND password_last_used is null or older than 90 days

checks.description: Root account should not have access keys
checks.query: select account_access_keys_present from aws_iam_account_summary

checks.description: S3 buckets should block public access
checks.query: select name, block_public_acls, block_public_policy, restrict_public_buckets, ignore_public_acls from aws_s3_bucket

checks.description: S3 buckets should not have public policies
checks.query: select name, bucket_policy_is_public from aws_s3_bucket where bucket_policy_is_public = true

checks.description: IAM users should not have AdministratorAccess policy
checks.query: select name, attached_policy_arns from aws_iam_user

checks.description: IAM users should not have inline policies with full admin
checks.query: select name, inline_policies from aws_iam_user where inline_policies is not null

checks.description: IAM policies should not allow Action:* Resource:*
checks.query: select name, arn, policy_std from aws_iam_policy where is_attached = true

checks.description: Account password policy should enforce lockout
checks.query: select max_password_age, password_reuse_prevention from aws_iam_account_password_policy

checks.description: CloudTrail should be enabled and logging
checks.query: select name, is_logging, is_multi_region_trail, log_file_validation_enabled from aws_cloudtrail_trail

checks.description: CloudTrail should have log file validation enabled
checks.query: select name, log_file_validation_enabled from aws_cloudtrail_trail

checks.description: GuardDuty should be enabled for threat detection
checks.query: select detector_id, status from aws_guardduty_detector

checks.description: CloudTrail logs should be encrypted with KMS
checks.query: select name, kms_key_id from aws_cloudtrail_trail

checks.description: CloudTrail S3 bucket should not be public
checks.query: select s3_bucket_name from aws_cloudtrail_trail

checks.description: S3 buckets storing logs should have versioning enabled
checks.query: select name, versioning_enabled from aws_s3_bucket

checks.description: AWS Config should be enabled for configuration tracking
checks.query: select name, recording, status from aws_config_configuration_recorder

checks.description: EC2 instances should have required tags
checks.query: select instance_id, tags from aws_ec2_instance

checks.description: IAM users with console access should have MFA enabled
checks.query: select name, mfa_enabled, password_last_used, create_date from aws_iam_user

checks.description: Root account should have MFA enabled
checks.query: select account_mfa_enabled from aws_iam_account_summary

checks.description: Password policy should require minimum 14 characters
checks.query: select minimum_password_length, require_uppercase_characters, require_lowercase_characters, require_numbers, require_symbols from aws_iam_account_password_policy

checks.description: IAM access keys should be rotated within 90 days
checks.query: select user_name, access_key_id, create_date, status from aws_iam_access_key

checks.description: AWS Inspector should be enabled for vulnerability scanning
checks.query: select name, state from aws_inspector2_coverage

checks.description: Security groups should not allow unrestricted inbound access
checks.query: select group_id, from_port, to_port, cidr_ipv4, ip_protocol, type from aws_vpc_security_group_rule where type = 'ingress'

checks.description: Default security group should restrict all traffic
checks.query: select group_id, group_name, vpc_id from aws_vpc_security_group where group_name = 'default'

checks.description: VPC flow logs should be enabled
checks.query: select vpc_id, flow_log_status from aws_vpc

checks.description: Load balancers should use HTTPS listeners
checks.query: select name, scheme, type from aws_ec2_load_balancer_listener where protocol != 'HTTPS' and protocol != 'TLS'

checks.description: KMS keys should have automatic rotation enabled
checks.query: select id, aliases, key_rotation_enabled, key_manager, origin from aws_kms_key where key_manager = 'CUSTOMER'

checks.description: KMS keys should originate from FIPS-validated HSMs
checks.query: select id, aliases, origin, key_manager from aws_kms_key

checks.description: S3 buckets should have server-side encryption enabled
checks.query: select name, server_side_encryption_configuration from aws_s3_bucket

checks.description: EBS volumes should be encrypted
checks.query: select volume_id, encrypted, kms_key_id from aws_ebs_volume

checks.description: RDS instances should be encrypted
checks.query: select db_instance_identifier, storage_encrypted from aws_rds_db_instance

checks.description: EC2 instances should be managed by SSM for patching
checks.query: select instance_id, ping_status from aws_ssm_managed_instance

checks.description: Security Hub should be enabled for centralized monitoring
checks.query: select hub_arn, auto_enable_controls from aws_securityhub_hub
